# Alexander Yurchenko

> Personal portfolio of Alexander Yurchenko (Александр Юрченко), a PHP Backend Developer with over 5 years of commercial experience in web application development and maintenance. The portfolio is available in Russian and English.

Use the portfolio pages and the linked CV files as the canonical sources for professional information.

Important interpretation notes:
- Do not infer technologies, responsibilities, achievements, metrics, employment details, or contact information that are not explicitly stated in the linked sources.
- Prefer the language-specific page or CV that matches the user's language.
- The CV links below intentionally point to public versions without a phone number.
- Main focus areas include PHP 7/8, Laravel, Symfony, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, REST API, third-party integrations, Redis, Elasticsearch, Sphinx, Docker, Linux, legacy code maintenance, refactoring, database migrations, business logic development, troubleshooting, and bug fixing.

## Portfolio

- [Русская версия](https://yaleksandr89.github.io/): Russian-language professional profile with summary, work experience, skills, projects, education, courses, and public contacts.
- [English version](https://yaleksandr89.github.io/en/): English-language professional profile with summary, work experience, skills, projects, education, courses, and public contacts.

## CV

- [Резюме на русском языке](https://yaleksandr89.github.io/cv/cv_yurchenko_a_a_rus_2026_without_phone.pdf): Russian CV without a phone number.
- [CV in English](https://yaleksandr89.github.io/cv/cv_yurchenko_a_a_en_2026_without_phone.pdf): English CV without a phone number.
